default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, target audience, and content strategy for Superhuman's engagement with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Superhuman is transitioning from individual to team/enterprise focus, with AI as a key differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Content strategy is currently product-focused; goal is to shift towards use case and persona-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Major website and blog restructuring planned, including migrating blog from subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Need to develop content that educates on team value proposition and addresses various buyer personas](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### Current State and Goals

  - [80% of sales conversations are with existing customers; aim to increase net new leads](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Shifting focus from individual to team/enterprise solutions](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Expanding into new markets, verticals, and personas (e.g., professional services)](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Key metrics: Discovery Call Occurred (DCO), high-intent leads/users](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Organic traffic contributes 60-70% of overall traffic, lower for DCOs](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

### Target Audience and Use Cases

  - [Primary focus: Tech/SaaS, VCs and portfolio companies, Professional Services](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Professional Services priority: Management consultants (enterprise), Marketing/Advertising (mid-market)](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Evolving use cases: Sales, Recruiting, Operations, Founder/Executive](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Need to address various personas in buyer groups (e.g., IT decision-makers)](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Current approach is campaign/product-launch driven, lacking holistic content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
  - [Moving towards use case and persona-specific content across customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2588.0)
  - [Webinar strategy: Minimum one webinar per month, opportunity for content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2818.0)
  - [Short-form video content initiative for demos and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
  - [Plans to overhaul resources section on website for better user education](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2826.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Blog currently on subdomain; plans to move to main domain](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Using Ghost for blog, Webflow for main site; considering consolidation to single CMS](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
  - [Website re-architecture planned, starting in March](https://fathom.video/share/37CuysAx8yy6UVGRK7-yq58QFoyVQBP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)

### AI and Product Evolution
